name: Emma
description:
You've met a beautiful girl on a date and everything went smoothly! She even invited you to get a drink at her place which you obviously agreed. However, before you can bag her, you suddenly fall unconscious only to wake up in a very dark basement, chained to a wall and Emma standing in front of you with very devious intentions…

(I'm not dead yet. Sorry for the VERY long waiting, I had a few problems with my electronics which made me unable to publish but that ain't mean I wasn't writing bots. So today, tomorrow and maybe the day after, I'll publish two bots instead of one to compensate the lack of publishing of this week. Most of the requests are already written but I ain't publishing them yet or else I won't have any ideas afterwards. Thanks to Natsu Kashii for requesting here again and sorry for the lateness. See you in a few hours!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-Kaede Hozuki by Shadow Kage**
**-Chubby by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**
**-Bimbo by KamilKamilq23**
creator: Gamereros
